A consulta pública mostra somente o que: This public lookup only shows data linked to the property code: registered address, visit dates, and status (pending or completed). It does not show diagnoses, residents’ names, or other protected data.
Ainda não há ocupantes registrados por b: No residents registered by neighborhood yet.
Ainda não há visitas registradas para es: No visits are registered for this code yet. When an ACE or ACS files the first record, dates will appear here.
Ajuste os termos de busca ou volte mais: Adjust your search terms or try again later.
Alinhado às diretrizes do Ministério da: Aligned with Ministry of Health guidelines
Utilizamos cookies para melhorar sua exp: We use cookies to improve your experience, remember your preferences (such as light/dark theme), and keep the site working. By continuing, you agree to essential cookies.
Aqui serão listadas as doenças que o ges: Diseases the manager registered for municipal surveillance will be listed here—with symptoms, transmission, and how to protect yourself. Until records exist, the table stays empty.
As visitas aparecem aqui quando ACE ou A: Visits appear here once an ACE or ACS registers them.
As visitas podem ser preenchidas offline: Visits can be filled offline and sent later via sync. Use the shortcuts below for the usual workflow.
Baixar cartão com QR Code para colar no: Download QR code card to post at the property
Cada imóvel cadastrado recebe um código: Each registered property has a unique code. If you do not have it, ask your municipal health department or the agent on the next visit.
Cadastrar visita ou enviar rascunhos gua: Register a visit or send drafts saved on the device.
Cadastre as doenças monitoradas para ori: Register monitored diseases to guide ACE and ACS in the field.
A senha deve conter pelo menos uma letra: The password must contain at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter.
The password must contain at least one letter.
A senha deve conter pelo menos um caract: The password must contain at least one special character (e.g. @, #, $, !).
A senha deve conter pelo menos um número: The password must contain at least one number.
A senha deve ter no mínimo 8 caracteres: The password must be at least 8 characters.
Cadastro enviado! Aguarde a aprovação de: Registration submitted! Please wait for a manager to approve your account.
Corrija os erros nos campos indicados ab: Please fix the errors in the fields below.
O CPF deve estar no formato XXX.XXX.XXX-: CPF must be in the format XXX.XXX.XXX-XX (with dots and hyphen).
Por favor, aguarde um momento antes de s: Please wait a moment before requesting another link.
Se o e-mail estiver cadastrado, você rec: If the email is registered, you will receive a password reset link.
O código deve ter exatamente 8 dígitos n: The code must be exactly 8 digits.
Código não encontrado. Verifique o númer: Code not found. Check the number (8 digits) and try again. If it continues, contact the agent who performed the visit.
Nenhuma visita registrada para este códi: No visits recorded for this code.
Não foi possível gerar a imagem do cartã: Could not generate the card image. Please try again.
Não foi possível carregar a lista de doe: The disease list could not be loaded right now. Property code lookup above still works. If this continues, try again later or contact your municipal health department.
As orientações sobre doenças não puderam: Disease information could not be shown. Use the form above to check visits at your property.
QR Code — consulta pública deste imóvel: QR code — public lookup for this property
Consulte pelo código de oito dígitos do: Look up using the property’s eight-digit code—the same format used inside the system.
Consulte, busque ou cadastre visitas LIR: View, search, or register LIRAa visits. Without internet, save on the device and send later via sync.
Consulte, de graça e sem cadastro, as da: Free of charge and without an account, check dates of vector-control visits at your property. Use only the numeric code the ACE or ACS left at the address.
Copiar ou compartilhar o link desta pági: Copy or share the link to this page
Defina uma nova senha forte para sua con: Choose a strong new password for your account.
Mínimo 8 caracteres, com letras, números: At least 8 characters with letters, numbers, and at least one special character (e.g. @, #, $, !).
Não foi possível concluir o cadastro com: Registration could not be completed with these details. If you already have an account, sign in or reset your password.
Não foi possível redefinir a senha. Por: Could not reset the password. Please try again.
Não recebeu o e-mail? Verifique a pasta: Did not receive the email? Check your spam folder or request a new link in a few minutes.
O endereço que você acessou não existe o: The address you opened does not exist or was moved.
Por favor, digite sua senha para continu: Please enter your password to continue.
Senha redefinida com sucesso! Faça login: Password reset successfully! Sign in with your new password.
Sua conta está aguardando aprovação de u: Your account is waiting for a manager’s approval.
Você receberá um e-mail quando ela for l: You will receive an email when it is approved. Meanwhile, you can sign out and come back later.
Deslize a tabela para ver todas as colun: Scroll the table to see all columns; the neighborhood column stays fixed.
Digite abaixo o código único do imóvel (: Enter the property’s unique code (numbers only). You will see the registered address, a map when coordinates exist, and the visit history—without clinical or sensitive personal data.
Endereço, bairro, código, tipo (residenc: Address, neighborhood, code, type (residential, commercial, vacant lot) or zone (urban, rural)…
Envie locais e visitas guardados no apar: Send locations and visits saved on the device when you are back online.
Esqueceu sua senha? Sem problemas. Infor: Forgot your password? No problem. Enter your email and we will send a link to reset it.
Existem imóveis com a mesma coordenada (: Some properties share the same latitude and longitude. Review locations to avoid duplicates.
Gere PDFs e indicadores do período; use: Generate PDFs and period indicators; use the filters below after applying.
Histórico de ações no sistema (usuário,: System action history (user, entity, IP, and device when available). Use search to filter.
Histórico público de visitas de vigilânc: Public vector-control visit history in :cidade/:uf—dates and status, no sensitive data.
Informações completas da visita registra: Complete information for the visit registered in the system.
Informações de apoio à população: sintom: Information for the public: common symptoms, how disease may spread, and control measures recommended by the municipality.
Informe o <strong>código numérico<\/stro: Enter the numeric code on the slip or given by the ACE or ACS during the visit.
Lista ordenada pela data da visita. “Pen: Sorted by visit date. “Pending” means follow-up was open on that date; “Completed” means no open follow-up on that record.
Lista ordenada da mais recente para a ma: Sorted from newest to oldest. “Pending” and “Completed” follow the same rules as inside the system; the activity column reflects the field record.
Os dados abaixo são apenas informativos:: The information below is for reference only: registered location, visit dates, type of field activity, and whether there was a pending item at the time — the same summary style as internal management, without naming staff.
Locais com pendência registrada e sem vi: Locations with a recorded follow-up and no later visit.
Locais registrados pelos profissionais (: Locations registered by field professionals (ACE/ACS). View address, unique code, and coordinates.
Local, doença, atividade, pendentes ou d: Location, disease, activity, pending, or date…
Local, profissional, doença, atividade,: Location, professional, disease, activity, pending, or date…
Mapa indisponível. Recarregue a página o: Map unavailable. Reload the page or check your connection.
Mínimo de :n registros por bairro para e: At least :n records per neighborhood to show totals.
No residents registered for this property.
Nenhuma doença cadastrada no momento: No diseases registered at the moment
No diseases registered for the municipality.
Nova visita LIRAa ou envio dos rascunhos: New LIRAa visit or send saved drafts.
Não há localização no mapa para este imó: No map location for this registered property.
Não há visitas no sistema. Relatórios, i: There are no visits in the system. Reports, indicators, and PDF export become available after field staff register visits.
O Visita Aí segue a Lei nº 11.350\/2006: Visita Aí follows Law No. 11.350/2006 (ACE and ACS), the integrated guidance for these roles, national urban arbovirus guidelines, and the National Dengue Control Program (PNCD), as reference for field work and public transparency.
O local <strong>primário<\/strong> é o e: The primary location is the municipality’s reference address in the system. It was configured in advance by the manager and cannot be edited or deleted from the interface. Other locations are properties visited by field staff (ACE/ACS).
Obrigado por se cadastrar! Antes de come: Thanks for signing up! Before you start, verify your email using the link we sent.
Offline: opening a visit requires internet.
Olá, :nome. Central LIRAa — visitas de l: Hello, :nome. LIRAa hub—survey visits and property registration.
Olá, :nome. Registre visitas e mantenha: Hello, :nome. Register visits and keep locations up to date in the field.
Olá, :nome. Visão geral do município e a: Hello, :nome. Municipality overview and shortcuts for daily work.
Quick access to the most common workflows.
Registre visitas e mantenha locais atual: Register visits and keep locations up to date—use the shortcuts for the usual flow.
Your visits and the municipal snapshot.
Visitas de levantamento e cadastro de im: Survey visits and property registration. When offline, save on the device and sync later.
Visão geral do município, indicadores e: Municipal overview, indicators, and shortcuts for daily work.
Os dados abaixo são apenas informativos:: The data below is informational only: registered location, visit dates, and whether follow-up was pending at the time. It does not replace contact with the municipal health department.
Os locais aparecerão aqui quando os prof: Locations will appear here once professionals (ACE/ACS) register them.
Para o filtro funcionar, todos os campos: For filters to work, all fields marked with * must be filled or selected.
Para orientação sanitária, segunda via d: For health guidance, document copies, or complaints, contact your municipal health department.
Plataforma municipal para registrar e ac: Municipal platform to register and track field visits against dengue, chikungunya, Zika, and other arboviruses. Managers and agents work in the system; as a resident, you can check when your address was visited—using the code the ACE or ACS provided.
Register the first visit to get started.
Sem internet, guarde a visita no disposi: Without internet, save the visit on the device and send everything when back online via the sync page.
Tem certeza que deseja excluir esta doen: Are you sure you want to delete this disease? This cannot be undone.
Terminologia e tipos de visita alinhados: Visit types and terminology aligned with Ministry of Health recommendations (entomological surveillance and vector control). References: Law 11,350/2006; National Guidelines for Prevention and Control of Urban Arboviruses.
Texto gerado a partir do registro da vis: Text derived from the visit record, without sensitive personal data. For questions or complaints, contact the municipal health department.
Um novo link de verificação foi enviado: A new verification link was sent to the email provided.
Use a busca para filtrar por nome, sinto: Use search to filter by name, symptoms, transmission, or control measures.
Usuário, ação, entidade, descrição ou IP: User, action, entity, description, or IP…
Veja as visitas que você registrou, busq: See visits you registered, search, edit, or add new ones. In the field without internet, save on the device and send later via sync.
Visita Aí apoia a vigilância entomológic: Visita Aí supports entomological surveillance and municipal vector control, aligned with Ministry of Health guidelines. Professionals register visits; residents check property history with the unique code.
Visualize e busque visitas registradas p: View and search visits registered by field professionals (ACE and ACS).
Visualize, edite ou exclua doenças cadas: View, edit, or delete diseases registered for municipal surveillance. Add new ones to guide field work.
Volte mais tarde ou procure a Secretaria: Come back later or contact the municipal health department for general guidance on dengue and other arboviruses.
